_documentation.description: Contenido específico de la página de contacto (información, formularios, ubicación)
_documentation.usage: Página /contact, modal de contacto, formularios de comunicación
_documentation.contains: Información de empresa, emails, teléfonos, direcciones, redes sociales

seo.title: Contact
seo.description: Contact us at Hipermercado Superior. We are available by email, phone, or contact form. Customer service Monday to Sunday, 8:00 AM – 10:00 PM.
seo.keywords: hypermarket contact, customer service, support, supermarket phone, hypermarket email

name.length: Name must be between 2 and 50 characters.
name.format: Name can only contain letters and spaces.

phone.format: Phone format is invalid. Use 8-15 digits (e.g., 8095555555 or (809) 555-5555).

message.length: Message must be between 10 and 500 characters.
